arts.ttl: “Secured” | ExWHUEmployee | West Ham strike deal for Academy defender
arts.sum: West Ham have secured the future of defender Ryan Battrum, it’s been reported by ExWHUEmployee. The Academy U21 defender, who has also captained the club at U18 level, is very highly rated at the club and has now signed a new 2 year contract.
